stonetop.summary: A shape-stealing flesh-weaving ooze, blank canvas of the Green Lords.

system.concept: A shape-stealing flesh-weaving ooze, blank canvas of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.VosjScKksp5B3hsc]{Green Lords}.
system.description: These… things… served as blank canvasses for the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.VosjScKksp5B3hsc]{Green Lords}' flesh-weaving. Once they were kept carefully locked away in laboratories and breeding pits; now, with their creators gone all these years, who knows where they might be found? Command one in the tongue of the Green Lords and it might obey — or accept you as its master. It grows by consuming the living, and can split off smaller copies of itself.
